TEST 1: Bot Wave Detection         Mass registrations from same IP in short time
TEST 2: Coordinated Suspicious Logins         Multiple simultaneous login attemp
TEST 3: Geodrift Detection         User registration from one IP, then rapid log
TEST 4: Quarantine Lifecycle         User gets quarantined, test state transitio
TEST 5: Credential Stuffing Detection         Rapid failed login attempts agains
TEST 6: Mixed Attack Pattern         Combination of bot wave + failed logins + g
